requires.rationale: ≥4 enum/categorical facets justify dedicated chip toolbar over inline dropdowns

structure.description: Horizontal row of facet chips above catalog body (type, platform, env, tag, owner, domain). Each chip opens a popover with multi-select; active filters render as removable chips inline.

rationale.hypothesis: When a catalog has many faceted attributes, sidebar facets consume horizontal space while inline dropdowns hide active state. Chip toolbar makes both available filters and active filters visible in one strip.

evidence.description: Search results header — chips for type/platform/env/tag/term/owner/domain
Event explorer chip-row for property filters

counterexample.description: With few facets, inline dropdowns are simpler

shouldMatch.reason: status, courier, restaurant, payment-method, time-range — many facets

shouldNotMatch.reason: Only date facet — chip toolbar overkill
